ai_summary: Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) has appointed Shri Rajneesh Narain as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel, effective July 14, 2026. Narain, who joined IRCTC as Director (Finance) just a month prior, brings over 30 years of extensive financial leadership experience predominantly from the coal industry. This rapid appointment and significant industry background shift for a key financial executive in a catering and tourism enterprise may warrant observation regarding the strategic financial direction for IRCTC.
